{{Quote|I haven't danced for ages, as well you can tell…''"</br>"''You're clearly naturally talented in that department, then.''"</br>"''No, you have the talent—you keep your feet out from beneath mine.''"</br>"''You lead, I follow. Very easy to do Wedge.|Wedge Antilles and Reina Faleur|<ref name="Rogue32" />}}
'''Reina Faleur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] who held the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] under the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[Quartermaster Corps (New Republic)|Quartermaster Corps]]. Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Faleur was tasked with supplying [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] the equipment it needed. She briefly had a romantic liaison with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="Rogue32" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Reina Faleur first appeared in the [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|thirty-second issue]] of the [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book series]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'', which was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]], illustrated by [[Steve Crespo]],<ref name="Rogue32" /> and published on [[July 15]], [[1998]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54677/star_wars_x-wing_rogue_squadron_1995_32|text=Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron (1995) #32}}</ref>
